response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified two songs. 2. Performed OCR on on-screen text to identify songs: 'UNDEAD' by Ayase and '愛♡スクリーム!' by aim/DJ Chika. 3. Used DuckDuckGo to search for lyrics using the template '[Song Title] [Artist] Japanese and English lyrics'. 4. Found lyric snippets for both songs and structured the JSON.
response.global_summary: A 2-song live performance medley featuring virtual idol Aki Rosenthal in a game-themed concert setting.

scenes.description: The performer starts singing 'UNDEAD' on a stage with a casino/game theme while on-screen text identifies the song and composer.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Unhappy? 悩める人の子よ
Unlucky? 人成らざる者も
Be happy! 弛まず目指せよ
アンデッド！生きているんだし
目を逸らした過去も
退屈な未来も
カウンセリング
Universal, peace, peace, yeah!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Unhappy? You troubled child
Unlucky? Including you who are not human
Be happy! Aim tirelessly
UNDEAD! You are alive, right?
Even the past you turned your eyes away from
And the boring future
Counseling you, oh my, oh my
Universal, peace, peace, yeah!

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal transitions into '愛♡スクリーム!' (Ai♡Scream!) accompanied by other performers on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
愛、愛、愛、愛... クリーム！
愛、愛、愛、愛... 愛♡スクリ～ム！
教えてもっと、あなたのことを
愛、愛、愛、愛... 愛♡スクリ～ム！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ai, Ai, Ai, Ai... Cream!
Ai, Ai, Ai, Ai... Ai♡Scream!
Teach me more, I want to know all about you
Ai, Ai, Ai, Ai... Ai♡Scream!
